fa-wave-square.appearanceId: a horizontal waveform made of right-angle steps alternating between flat top and flat bottom segments, forming a repeating rectangular step pattern; square wave signal line with sharp 90-degree corners
fa-wave-square.functionalityId: represents a square wave signal or digital waveform; indicates a digital audio signal, electrical square wave, or oscilloscope pattern
fa-wave-square.intentId: display or select a square wave signal type; represent digital audio waveform or electrical signal shape in an audio or electronics interface

fa-wave-triangle.appearanceId: a horizontal waveform made of repeating V-shaped zigzag lines rising and falling at equal angles, forming a continuous triangular wave pattern; triangle wave signal line with angled peak-and-valley zigzags
fa-wave-triangle.functionalityId: represents a triangle wave signal or synthesizer waveform type; indicates an audio synthesis waveform, electrical triangle wave, or oscillator shape
fa-wave-triangle.intentId: display or select a triangle wave signal type; represent an audio synthesizer or oscillator waveform in a music production or electronics interface

fa-waveform.appearanceId: a horizontal line of irregular vertical amplitude bars of varying heights forming an audio waveform pattern; an uneven sound wave visualization with tall and short vertical bars clustered along a baseline
fa-waveform.functionalityId: represents an audio waveform or sound recording visualization; indicates a sound clip, audio track, or voice recording amplitude display
fa-waveform.intentId: display or interact with an audio waveform; represent a sound recording or audio track in a media player or audio editing interface

fa-waveform-circle.appearanceId: a circular outline containing a miniature audio waveform pattern of varying-height vertical bars centered within the circle; a round badge enclosing an audio amplitude visualization
fa-waveform-circle.functionalityId: represents an audio waveform contained within a circular badge; indicates a compact audio track, voice message, or sound recording indicator
fa-waveform-circle.intentId: display or access a compact audio waveform or voice message; represent a sound recording in a circular badge in a messaging or media interface

fa-waveform-path.appearanceId: a curved or horizontal path line with an audio waveform of varying-height amplitude bars riding along it; an audio waveform visualization integrated along a curved timeline or path line
fa-waveform-path.functionalityId: represents an audio waveform along a timeline or path; indicates a sound track positioned along a timeline, path animation, or audio routing
fa-waveform-path.intentId: display an audio waveform along a timeline or path; represent a sound track's position in a video editor or audio routing interface

fa-waves-sine.appearanceId: two or more smooth S-shaped sine wave curves flowing horizontally across the frame, showing the characteristic rounded crest and trough of a sinusoidal wave; multiple smooth sine curves layered or offset horizontally
fa-waves-sine.functionalityId: represents a sine wave or sinusoidal signal; indicates an analog audio signal, AC power waveform, or smooth oscillating pattern
fa-waves-sine.intentId: display or select a sine wave signal type; represent analog audio, AC power, or smooth oscillation in an audio, electronics, or physics interface

fa-webcam.appearanceId: a small circular camera lens centered on a rounded rectangular body with a short stand or mount base extending below; webcam device silhouette with a circular lens aperture and a base mount
fa-webcam.functionalityId: represents a webcam or computer video camera device; indicates video capture, video call, or live streaming from a built-in or external camera
fa-webcam.intentId: enable or access a webcam for video capture or video calling; represent a camera device in a video conferencing or streaming interface

fa-webcam-slash.appearanceId: a webcam device silhouette with a circular lens on a rounded rectangular body, overlaid with a diagonal slash line cutting through it; webcam outline with a negation slash indicating disabled state
fa-webcam-slash.functionalityId: represents a disabled, muted, or blocked webcam; indicates that video capture is turned off or the camera is unavailable
fa-webcam-slash.intentId: disable or indicate a turned-off webcam; show that video is muted or the camera is blocked in a video conferencing or privacy interface

fa-webhook.appearanceId: a curved hook shape resembling the letter J or a fishhook with a small circular loop or notch at the tip, forming a webhook symbol; a hook curve with a circular endpoint suggesting a connection latch
fa-webhook.functionalityId: represents a webhook or API callback endpoint; indicates an automated HTTP event trigger or integration callback
fa-webhook.intentId: configure or indicate a webhook endpoint; set up an automated API callback or event-driven integration in a developer or integration settings interface

fa-weight.appearanceId: a rounded rectangular or trapezoid scale platform base with a flat top surface suggesting a weighing scale platform; a flat-top weight or balance scale surface silhouette
fa-weight.functionalityId: represents body weight measurement or a weighing scale; indicates weight tracking, health monitoring, or mass measurement
fa-weight.intentId: track or display body weight; represent a weight measurement feature in a health, fitness, or medical tracking interface

fa-weight-hanging.appearanceId: a rounded bulb or sphere shape tapering to a flat top with a small rectangular hanging hook or loop protruding from the top center; a hanging weight or counterweight with a loop at the top
fa-weight-hanging.functionalityId: represents a hanging weight, counterweight, or heavy object; indicates mass, heaviness, or a weighted item in a physics or inventory context
fa-weight-hanging.intentId: indicate a heavy item or counterweight; represent physical mass or a weighted object in a shipping, inventory, or physics interface

fa-whale.appearanceId: a large whale body silhouette with a rounded head, a curved back, small pectoral fins along the side, and a broad horizontal tail fluke at the rear; side-view whale outline with tail flukes and pectoral fins
fa-whale.functionalityId: represents a whale animal or marine mammal; indicates ocean wildlife, marine biology, or a whale-themed branding element
fa-whale.intentId: display or identify a whale or marine mammal; represent ocean wildlife or a whale theme in a nature, conservation, or branding interface

fa-wheat.appearanceId: a single upright wheat stalk with a long stem, several small leaf blades branching along the sides, and a rounded seed head cluster at the top; a tall grain stalk silhouette with leafy side blades and a seed head
fa-wheat.functionalityId: represents wheat grain, a cereal crop, or agricultural produce; indicates farming, food ingredients, or grain-based content
fa-wheat.intentId: represent wheat or grain in a food, farming, or ingredient context; indicate cereal crop content in a recipe, agricultural, or nutrition interface

fa-wheat-alt.appearanceId: an alternate wheat stalk silhouette with a stem, leaf blades, and a slightly different seed head arrangement compared to the standard wheat; a grain stalk variant with an alternate seed head or leaf pattern
fa-wheat-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternate wheat or grain symbol; indicates cereal crops, farming, or grain-based food in an alternate visual style
fa-wheat-alt.intentId: represent wheat or grain using an alternate visual style; indicate cereal crop content in a recipe, agricultural, or nutrition interface

fa-wheat-awn-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: a wheat stalk with a barbed awn-style seed head (bristled grain tips), accompanied by a circular badge containing an exclamation mark overlaid or adjacent; a barbed grain head with a warning exclamation circle badge
fa-wheat-awn-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: represents a wheat or gluten allergen warning; indicates a gluten alert, wheat allergy caution, or grain-related dietary warning
fa-wheat-awn-circle-exclamation.intentId: alert to a wheat or gluten allergy or dietary restriction; indicate a grain allergen warning in a food labeling, menu, or health interface

fa-wheat-awn-slash.appearanceId: a wheat stalk with a barbed awn-style seed head featuring bristled grain tips, overlaid with a diagonal slash line cutting through the stalk; a barbed grain head silhouette with a negation slash
fa-wheat-awn-slash.functionalityId: represents a gluten-free or no-wheat indicator; indicates the absence of wheat, gluten-free certification, or wheat exclusion
fa-wheat-awn-slash.intentId: mark food or a product as gluten-free or wheat-free; indicate the removal or exclusion of wheat in a dietary, menu, or food labeling interface

fa-wheat-slash.appearanceId: a standard wheat stalk silhouette with stem and seed head, overlaid with a diagonal slash line cutting through it; a plain wheat stalk outline with a negation slash
fa-wheat-slash.functionalityId: represents a no-wheat or grain-free indicator; indicates wheat exclusion, grain-free diet, or wheat allergen removal
fa-wheat-slash.intentId: mark a product as wheat-free or grain-free; indicate the absence of wheat in a dietary, menu, or food labeling interface

fa-wheelchair.appearanceId: a side-view silhouette of a person seated in a wheelchair with a large rear wheel, a small front caster wheel, and the figure's arm extended toward the wheel rim; standard wheelchair accessibility symbol with a seated figure and large wheel
fa-wheelchair.functionalityId: represents wheelchair accessibility or a person with mobility impairment; indicates an accessible route, disabled facilities, or mobility aid
fa-wheelchair.intentId: indicate wheelchair accessibility or a disability accommodation; represent accessible facilities or mobility aid needs in a building, transport, or public service interface

fa-wheelchair-alt.appearanceId: a side-view silhouette of a person in a wheelchair depicted in a more dynamic or modern posture, leaning forward with arms raised suggesting active propulsion; an active or dynamic wheelchair user silhouette with a forward-leaning figure
fa-wheelchair-alt.functionalityId: represents an active wheelchair user or dynamic mobility accessibility symbol; indicates adaptive sports, active mobility, or an alternate accessibility symbol
fa-wheelchair-alt.intentId: indicate active wheelchair use or adaptive mobility; represent a modern accessibility symbol or adaptive sports in an inclusive design or accessibility interface

fa-whiskey-glass-ice.appearanceId: a short wide tumbler glass shape with a thick base, containing rectangular ice cube shapes submerged in liquid; a rocks glass silhouette with visible ice cubes inside
fa-whiskey-glass-ice.functionalityId: represents a whiskey on the rocks or iced cocktail drink; indicates a spirits serving, bar menu item, or an alcoholic beverage with ice
fa-whiskey-glass-ice.intentId: browse or order whiskey on the rocks or an iced drink; represent a spirits menu item or cocktail in a bar, restaurant, or beverage interface

fa-whistle.appearanceId: a small oval or cylindrical whistle body with a short cylindrical mouthpiece extending from one end and a small loop or ring at the opposite end; a referee whistle silhouette with a mouthpiece and loop
fa-whistle.functionalityId: represents a whistle or alert signal device; indicates a referee action, safety alert, sports event signal, or attention-getting notification
fa-whistle.intentId: signal an alert, start, or stop event; represent a referee call or safety signal in a sports, event management, or emergency interface

fa-wifi.appearanceId: three concentric arc curves above a small central dot at the base, each arc growing larger from bottom to top, representing full wireless signal strength; full-strength wifi signal with three stacked arcs and a center dot
fa-wifi.functionalityId: represents a full-strength WiFi or wireless network connection; indicates wireless connectivity, network availability, or internet access
fa-wifi.intentId: connect to or display a WiFi network; indicate wireless internet availability or signal strength in a network or device settings interface

fa-wifi-1.appearanceId: a single small arc curve above a small central dot at the base, representing minimal one-bar wireless signal strength; low-signal wifi with one arc and a center dot
fa-wifi-1.functionalityId: represents a one-bar or minimal WiFi signal strength; indicates a very weak wireless connection or low network signal
fa-wifi-1.intentId: display a low or minimal WiFi signal strength indicator; warn about a weak wireless connection in a network status or device settings interface

fa-wifi-2.appearanceId: two concentric arc curves above a small central dot at the base, representing medium two-bar wireless signal strength; medium-signal wifi with two stacked arcs and a center dot
fa-wifi-2.functionalityId: represents a two-bar or medium WiFi signal strength; indicates a moderate wireless connection or partial network signal
fa-wifi-2.intentId: display a medium WiFi signal strength indicator; show a partial wireless connection status in a network status or device settings interface

fa-wifi-exclamation.appearanceId: three concentric arc curves above a small central dot with a small exclamation mark badge overlaid below or adjacent to the arcs; full wifi arc stack with a warning exclamation badge
fa-wifi-exclamation.functionalityId: represents a WiFi connection warning or network error; indicates a wireless connection issue, authentication problem, or network alert
fa-wifi-exclamation.intentId: alert to a WiFi connection problem or network warning; indicate a wireless error or login requirement in a network status or connectivity interface

fa-wifi-slash.appearanceId: three concentric arc curves above a small central dot, overlaid with a diagonal slash line cutting through the arcs; full wifi arc stack with a negation slash indicating no connection
fa-wifi-slash.functionalityId: represents a disabled, disconnected, or unavailable WiFi connection; indicates no wireless network, WiFi turned off, or signal blocked
fa-wifi-slash.intentId: indicate that WiFi is disconnected or disabled; show no wireless connection available in a network status or device settings interface

fa-wind.appearanceId: three or more curved horizontal lines of varying lengths tapering to points at the right end, each offset vertically, suggesting flowing wind or air movement; multiple curved airflow lines suggesting a blowing breeze
fa-wind.functionalityId: represents wind, airflow, or a breeze; indicates weather conditions, ventilation, or air movement in a context
fa-wind.intentId: display wind or air movement information; represent weather conditions or ventilation in a weather, outdoor activity, or HVAC interface

fa-wind-turbine.appearanceId: a vertical pole or tower with three elongated blade shapes radiating from a central hub at the top in a propeller or pinwheel arrangement; a wind turbine silhouette with a tower mast and three rotor blades
fa-wind-turbine.functionalityId: represents a wind turbine or wind energy generator; indicates renewable energy, wind power generation, or sustainable electricity
fa-wind-turbine.intentId: represent wind energy or a wind turbine installation; indicate renewable power generation in an energy, sustainability, or utility interface

fa-wind-warning.appearanceId: curved horizontal airflow lines suggesting wind movement, accompanied by a triangular warning badge with an exclamation mark; wind flow lines paired with a caution triangle badge
fa-wind-warning.functionalityId: represents a wind warning or high-wind weather alert; indicates dangerous wind conditions, storm warnings, or wind-related hazards
fa-wind-warning.intentId: alert to dangerous wind conditions or a high-wind weather warning; represent a wind hazard or storm alert in a weather or outdoor safety interface

fa-window.appearanceId: a rectangular frame outline divided into panes by a horizontal bar and a vertical bar forming a four-pane grid window; a rectangular window frame with a cross mullion dividing it into four sections
fa-window.functionalityId: represents a window pane or building window; indicates a window element in architecture, a GUI window frame, or a view panel
fa-window.intentId: represent a window in an architectural, real estate, or GUI context; indicate a panel or view in a building design or interface layout

fa-window-alt.appearanceId: a rectangular window frame outline with an alternate pane arrangement, such as a single horizontal dividing bar creating a two-pane window instead of four; an alternate rectangular window frame with a simplified pane division
fa-window-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternate window frame style; indicates a simplified window view or alternate GUI window variant
fa-window-alt.intentId: represent an alternate window style in an architectural or GUI context; indicate a simplified panel or view variant in an interface layout

fa-window-close.appearanceId: a rectangular window frame outline containing an X shape in the upper-right corner or centered within the frame, indicating a close control; a window frame with an X close button inside
fa-window-close.functionalityId: represents closing a window or dialog; indicates the close action for a modal, panel, or OS window
fa-window-close.intentId: close a window, modal, or dialog panel; dismiss an open interface element in a desktop or web application interface

fa-window-frame.appearanceId: a rectangular window frame outline without interior pane dividers, showing an empty open frame shape; a plain empty rectangular window frame border with no pane divisions
fa-window-frame.functionalityId: represents an empty window frame or outer window border; indicates a window container, frame element, or empty panel structure
fa-window-frame.intentId: represent an empty window frame or container; indicate a panel border or window structure in a GUI layout or design interface

fa-window-frame-open.appearanceId: a rectangular window frame outline with one side or panel shown open or ajar, indicated by a gap or an open flap in the frame; an empty window frame with an open or ajar side panel
fa-window-frame-open.functionalityId: represents an open window frame or an unobstructed window opening; indicates ventilation, an accessible view, or an opened panel
fa-window-frame-open.intentId: represent an open window or ventilation opening; indicate an accessible or open panel in an architectural, real estate, or GUI interface

fa-window-maximize.appearanceId: a rectangular window frame outline with small corner arrows or an expand indicator at the corners, suggesting full-screen or maximized state; a window frame with outward-pointing corner expansion markers
fa-window-maximize.functionalityId: represents maximizing a window to fill the screen; indicates the maximize control for a desktop window or panel
fa-window-maximize.intentId: maximize a window or panel to full screen; expand a view or interface element to fill the available screen space

fa-window-minimize.appearanceId: a rectangular window frame outline with a small horizontal bar or downward arrow at the bottom, suggesting a minimized or collapsed state; a window frame with a collapse indicator at the base
fa-window-minimize.functionalityId: represents minimizing or collapsing a window; indicates the minimize control for a desktop window or panel
fa-window-minimize.intentId: minimize a window or panel to the taskbar; collapse or hide an interface element in a desktop or application interface

fa-window-restore.appearanceId: two overlapping rectangular window frames, one offset diagonally behind the other, suggesting a restored or windowed state between maximized and minimized; a pair of layered offset window rectangles
fa-window-restore.functionalityId: represents restoring a window to its previous size from maximized state; indicates the restore window control for a desktop panel
fa-window-restore.intentId: restore a maximized window to its previous size; return a window to its windowed state from full screen in a desktop interface

fa-windsock.appearanceId: a tapered cone or tube shape open at the wide end and narrowing to a pointed tip, mounted on a short vertical pole, representing a wind direction indicator; a conical windsock sleeve on a pole showing wind direction
fa-windsock.functionalityId: represents a windsock or wind direction indicator; indicates wind direction, airfield conditions, or outdoor wind assessment
fa-windsock.intentId: indicate wind direction or airfield wind conditions; represent outdoor wind assessment in an aviation, weather, or outdoor activity interface

fa-wine-bottle.appearanceId: a tall slender bottle silhouette with a narrow cylindrical neck tapering from a wider lower body, representing a standard wine bottle profile; a wine bottle outline with a narrow neck and wider lower body
fa-wine-bottle.functionalityId: represents a wine bottle or bottled wine product; indicates a wine selection, beverage inventory, or alcoholic drink option
fa-wine-bottle.intentId: browse or select a wine bottle or wine product; represent a bottled beverage in a restaurant menu, wine cellar, or beverage inventory interface

fa-wine-glass.appearanceId: a stemmed wine glass silhouette with a curved bowl narrowing at the base to a thin stem and flat foot, representing a standard red or white wine glass; a classic stemmed wine glass outline with a rounded bowl and thin stem
fa-wine-glass.functionalityId: represents a wine glass or stemmed drink glass; indicates a wine serving, restaurant menu item, or fine dining context
fa-wine-glass.intentId: browse or select wine or a wine-glass serving; represent a wine serving or fine dining context in a restaurant, menu, or beverage interface

fa-wine-glass-alt.appearanceId: a stemmed wine glass silhouette with a more elongated or differently-shaped bowl compared to the standard wine glass, such as a narrower flute-like or alternate glass shape; an alternate stemmed wine glass outline with a varied bowl shape
fa-wine-glass-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternate wine glass style or champagne flute; indicates a sparkling wine, champagne, or alternate glassware option
fa-wine-glass-alt.intentId: browse or select champagne or an alternate wine glass serving; represent a sparkling wine or specialized glassware in a restaurant, menu, or beverage interface

fa-worm.appearanceId: a segmented worm body shape with a small rounded head at one end and a series of rounded body segments curving along a short undulating path; a segmented earthworm outline with a rounded head and wavy body
fa-worm.functionalityId: represents a worm or earthworm creature; indicates gardening, composting, soil health, or a worm-themed element
fa-worm.intentId: represent a worm or earthworm in a gardening, nature, or biology context; indicate soil health or composting in an agricultural or educational interface

fa-wreath.appearanceId: a circular ring shape made of overlapping leaf or foliage clusters forming a decorative wreath, with an open center; a round decorative wreath outline of leaves or foliage arranged in a circle
fa-wreath.functionalityId: represents a decorative wreath or holiday seasonal decoration; indicates celebration, festivity, or a seasonal decorative element
fa-wreath.intentId: represent a decorative wreath or seasonal holiday decoration; indicate a festive or celebratory element in a holiday, event, or greeting interface

fa-wreath-laurel.appearanceId: a circular ring made of elongated laurel leaf shapes arranged in a wreath pattern with pointed leaf tips, forming a classical laurel wreath; a round laurel leaf wreath with pointed leaves arranged in a circle
fa-wreath-laurel.functionalityId: represents a laurel wreath symbolizing victory, honor, or achievement; indicates an award, achievement badge, or classical honor symbol
fa-wreath-laurel.intentId: represent an achievement, honor, or award using a laurel wreath; indicate a victory or recognition symbol in a competition, education, or achievements interface

fa-wrench.appearanceId: an adjustable wrench silhouette with an elongated handle and an open jaw with a movable worm gear adjustment mechanism at the head; a standard adjustable wrench outline with a movable jaw at the head
fa-wrench.functionalityId: represents a wrench tool or maintenance action; indicates settings, configuration, repair, or technical tools in an interface
fa-wrench.intentId: access settings or perform maintenance; represent a repair or configuration tool in a settings, developer tools, or maintenance interface

fa-wrench-simple.appearanceId: a simplified wrench silhouette with a smooth handle and a fixed open-end jaw at the head, lacking the worm gear adjustment detail of the standard wrench; a plain open-end wrench outline with a simpler jaw and no adjustment mechanism
fa-wrench-simple.functionalityId: represents a simplified wrench or basic tool; indicates basic settings, a simple repair action, or a minimal configuration control
fa-wrench-simple.intentId: access basic settings or indicate a simple repair; represent a minimal configuration or maintenance control in a simplified settings interface

fa-x.appearanceId: a bold uppercase letter X character centered in the glyph space; a plain capital letter X letterform
fa-x.functionalityId: represents the letter X or a close or cancel action; indicates a keyboard shortcut, variable label, or a close or remove action
fa-x.intentId: display the letter X or indicate a close or cancel action; represent a variable, keyboard key, or dismiss control in an interface or document

fa-x-ray.appearanceId: a rectangular film frame outline containing a skeletal or bone structure silhouette such as a chest or hand skeleton, representing an X-ray radiograph image; a rectangular X-ray film border enclosing a skeletal bone outline
fa-x-ray.functionalityId: represents an X-ray radiograph or medical imaging scan; indicates diagnostic imaging, bone examination, or radiology in a medical context
fa-x-ray.intentId: access or display an X-ray or medical imaging scan; indicate a radiology or diagnostic imaging record in a healthcare or medical records interface
